career.name: Columbia Housing
career.title: Systems & Operations Assistant
description: Leading development of Dorm Room Viewer, a housing platform serving ~9,000 students with room-level floor plans, walk-time estimation, an AWS S3 image pipeline, and Columbia CAS (SSO) authentication. Designed and built internal tools and Node.js automation services supporting operations across ~40 residential buildings and ~6,000 rooms, automating workflows and synchronizing housing data across systems.

career.name: Headstarter AI
career.title: Software Engineering Fellow
description: Shipped 5 production AI applications in weekly sprints — RAG pipelines with OpenAI and Pinecone vector search, Stripe billing, and Next.js/TypeScript frontends. Won 1st place among 75+ participants at a TikTok-sponsored hackathon with a real-time blogging platform.

career.name: Freelance
career.title: Software Engineer
description: Delivered 500+ web applications and Discord bots for clients, scaling one bot to 13,000,000 users across 13,000+ servers on a Redis + MongoDB data layer with Bull.js job queues sustaining low-latency performance under high-volume concurrent traffic.
